title: CON EDISON DECLARES COMMON STOCK DIVIDEND
text: NEW YORK , July 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) (NYSE: ED) declared a quarterly dividend of 81 cents a share on its common stock, payable September 15, 2023 to stockholders of record as of August 16, 2023. Consolidated Edison, Inc. is one of the nation's largest investor-owned energy-delivery companies, with approximately $16 billion in annual revenues and $63 billion in assets.

title: Con Edison to Report 2nd Quarter 2023 Earnings on August 3
text: NEW YORK , July 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) (NYSE:ED) plans to report its 2nd Quarter 2023 earnings on August 3, 2023 after the market closes. Consolidated Edison, Inc. is one of the nation's largest investor-owned energy-delivery companies, with approximately $16 billion in annual revenues and $63 billion in assets.

title: Insiders Are Buying Consolidated Edison
text: The insiders don't hold much of Consolidated Edison, but they are putting their money into the company. The insiders have only bought stock for the last 5 quarters, and before that only bought stock save for a single transaction.
